_comment_s3: Public genome-idx inputs are downloaded unsigned (no creds). Results are uploaded to genome-idx by assuming the cross-account upload_role_arn from the instance role (credential_source=Ec2InstanceMetadata) -- no permanent credentials. Same model as build/bowtie and build/movi_kmer_bench.
_comment_ftab: Both ftab files land in the index dir so production read_ftab() and movi-co can pick either ftab-k at query time.
